arts.ttl: 'He can improve': Enzo Maresca sends warning to £150k-a-week Chelsea star
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has told Moises Caicedo that he can improve ahead of Chelsea vs Brighton despite a good run of form.

arts.ttl: We simulated Chelsea vs Brighton to get a score prediction for Premier League clash
arts.sum: Chelsea will be looking to make it three wins in a row in the Premier League later today when they host Brighton & Hove Albion. We predict that Chelsea could set up in a 4-2-3-1 formation, with their line-up as follows: Sanchez; Gusto, Fofana, Colwill, Cucurella; Caicedo, Enzo; Madueke, Palmer, Sancho; Jackson.

arts.ttl: 'I needed to get out of there': £40m star makes honest Chelsea exit admission
arts.sum: Callum Hudson-Odoi has shared why he needed to get out of Chelsea and the reasons behind his exit.

It was the transfer saga that dominated the whole summer window, and in the end, Chelsea evidently failed to land their major target, Victor Osimhen. However, all is not as it seems apparently, with the Blues expertly working a situation that took multiple twists and turns across the close season. Currently plying his trade at […] The post Chelsea’s cunning Osimhen strategy revealed appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Chelsea v Brighton: FPL team news + predicted line-ups
arts.sum: Team form, absentees and our predicted XIs The post Chelsea v Brighton: FPL team news + predicted line-ups appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe's feelings on Graham Potter as ex-Chelsea chief prepares for new role
arts.sum: Graham Potter has long been linked with a move to Manchester United ever since Sir Jim Ratcliffe seized control at Old Trafford and now the former Chelsea and Brighton boss could return

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher and Gary Neville both agree on prediction for Chelsea vs Brighton
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher and Roy Keane have both agreed on a prediction for Chelsea vs Brighton and Hove Albion this weekend.

arts.ttl: Pressure of large transfer fees can be ‘big problem’ for players – Enzo Maresca
arts.sum: Maresca’s expensively-assembled Chelsea side take on Brighton this weekend.

arts.ttl: Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca sends £200m reality check to Brighton ahead of clash
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has been impressed by the players Chelsea have purchased from Brighton and spoken highly about the impact of Moises Caicedo and Marc Cucurella this season for the Blues

arts.ttl: KEOWN TALKS TACTICS: Enzo Maresca's fine-tuning has Chelsea look like they are meaning business... it is time we started taking the Blues more seriously
arts.sum: MARTIN KEOWN: Like everyone, I had my reservations before a ball was kicked under Enzo Maresca , a coach who had never managed at a level this unforgiving.
